ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"> <Header><EnforcementAgentType><EnforcementAgentRegNum>892</EnforcementAgentRegNum><EnforcementAgentName>Христо Василев Георгиев</EnforcementAgentName></EnforcementAgentType><TransferDate>2024-12-17T01:00:02+02:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>{491aaf36-bba3-436d-a667-841540e55260}</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferData><IncomingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><OutgoingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><CasesReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><ActionReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2024-12-15T00:00:01+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>1</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20228920400524</CaseNum><CaseDate>2022-05-16</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>БОЯН ДРАГОМИРОВ КАТЕРИНОВ</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>ПДИ И У-Е НЕ СА ВРЪЧЕНИ НА ДЛЪЖНИКА НЕ Е ОТКРИТ ЗАЛЕПЕНО С-Е И.ИВАНОВ</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
